A = π/3, B = π/4

cos(π/4) = √2/2,    sin(π/4) = √2/2

cos(7π/12)

= (1/2)(√2/2) – (√3/2)(√2/2)  
= √2/4 – √6/4  
= (√2 – √6)/4

cos(7π/12) = (√2 – √6) / 4  = –(√6 – √2) / 4.

   • tan β = √3       ⇒  β = π/3  (principal value of arctan)

   = (1 + 2√3 + 3) / (1 − 3)  
   = (4 + 2√3) / (−2)  
   = −2 − √3.

tan( sin⁻¹(√2 / 2) + tan⁻¹(√3) ) = −2 − √3.
